name: agent-plugins
description: Plugin marketplace for AI coding agents (Claude Code, AGENTS.md-compatible): an installable monorepo of Markdown plugins.

plugins.name: sdd-kit
plugins.description: Spec-driven development kit: skills for spec.md and the execution plan.

plugins.name: claude-token-debug
plugins.description: Debugging toolkit for measuring where Claude Code's real token spend goes.

plugins.name: token-diet
plugins.description: Explicit-invocation command that analyzes a CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md target and installs an opt-in token-saving ruleset on confirmation.

plugins.name: markvault
plugins.description: Deterministic, offline, ~0-token PDF-to-Markdown extraction with an interchangeable strategy chain and a fail-closed anti-network-leak guardrail.
